home.title: Best Coffee & Green Coffee Beans in Lebanon | Arome Gourmet
home.description: Lebanon's real coffee experts. Arome Gourmet imports premium single-origin green coffee beans, small-batch roasts & the CUPPA JOY brand — sourced worldwide.

green.title: Green Coffee Beans in Lebanon — Single Origin Importer | Arome Gourmet
green.description: Buy premium single-origin green coffee beans in Lebanon. Arabica & Robusta from 16 origins — Ethiopia Sidamo, Colombia Supremo, Brazil Santos & more, for roasteries.

cuppa.title: CUPPA JOY — Best Roasted Coffee in Lebanon | Arome Gourmet
cuppa.description: CUPPA JOY: premium roasted coffee from the highlands of Ethiopia & Brazil, blended for the authentic Lebanese taste. Turkish, espresso, American & filter.

about.title: About Arome Gourmet — Family Coffee Roasters in Lebanon
about.description: A family-owned Lebanese coffee company sourcing the world's finest green coffee and small-batch roasting it for connoisseurs across the Middle East & Europe.

cross.title: Coffee Cross-Shipment & Container Consolidation | Arome Gourmet
cross.description: Consolidate small multi-origin green coffee orders into one container, shipped from Europe. Request a mixed-origin shipment from Arome Gourmet, Lebanon.

contact.title: Contact Arome Gourmet — Coffee Experts in Mkalles, Lebanon
contact.description: Get in touch with Arome Gourmet in Mkalles–Mansourieh, Lebanon. Call +961 1 687 493 or email info@aromegourmet.com for green coffee & CUPPA JOY inquiries.

blend.title: Blend Your Coffee Online — Coming Soon | Arome Gourmet
blend.description: Craft your own signature blend online — a new Arome Gourmet experience is on its way. Meanwhile, talk to our roasters about custom blends.

notFound.title: Page Not Found | Arome Gourmet
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist. Explore Arome Gourmet's green coffee, cross-shipment services and the CUPPA JOY brand instead.
